recommended_pattern: A reading-first spread with a clear headline hierarchy, deliberate measure, byline context, and images sequenced around the narrative.

decision_rules.if_long_form: Protect readable line length, stable progress cues, and return-to-reading behavior before adding modules.
decision_rules.if_live_updates: Separate timestamps and update notices from the authored article chronology.
decision_rules.if_image_led: Sequence images as evidence or pacing beats rather than as interchangeable decorative interruptions.

anti_patterns: Conversion overlays that repeatedly interrupt the reading flow.
Tiny body type or a compressed measure used to force more content above the fold.
A byline or dateline buried below unrelated promotional modules.
